trades.reasoning: All 5 bullish signals firing — RSI 65.5 in healthy momentum zone, MACD crossover, rising histogram, above SMA-20, and volume surge; semiconductor equipment is a high-conviction sector play with room to run before overbought territory.

Perfect score with all 5 bullish signals including volume surge and RSI 65.7 in ideal momentum zone; China property platform recovery theme with clean technical setup makes this a strong risk/reward entry.

decisions.briefing: Markets pulled back modestly today (S&P -0.5%, NASDAQ -0.7%), but this is a routine neutral-trend day rather than a risk-off signal. With 4 open slots and $843 in cash well above the $500 threshold, sitting idle would be leaving opportunity on the table. I'm deploying into ACMR and BEKE — both carry perfect momentum scores with RSI in the healthy 55–70 zone rather than overbought, giving them room to extend further.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities edged lower on Tuesday as investors digested mixed signals from ongoing trade policy developments and a cautious tone from Federal Reserve officials who reiterated their data-dependent approach to rate cuts. Tech stocks led the modest decline, with the NASDAQ falling 0.7% as profit-taking emerged in recent high-flyers following a strong multi-week rally. Treasury yields held near recent highs, reflecting lingering uncertainty about the timing of the next rate cut and keeping pressure on growth-oriented sectors.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市週二小幅收低，投資者持續評估貿易政策走向及聯準會官員偏謹慎的表態，後者重申將以數據為依歸決定降息時機。那斯達克指數領跌，下跌0.7%，主要因科技股在近期強勁反彈後出現獲利了結。美國公債殖利率維持在近期高位，市場對降息時間表的不確定性持續，對成長型板塊形成壓力。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy where you buy stocks that have been trending upward and showing strong technical signals — like rising RSI, MACD crossovers, and above-average volume — betting that the trend will continue. Today's top picks (ACMR, BEKE) all scored 100 on the momentum screener because they hit every bullish signal without being overbought, which is the sweet spot. The risk is that momentum can reverse sharply, which is why stop-losses at -7% act as a safety net.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入處於上升趨勢且技術指標強勁的股票，例如RSI上升、MACD黃金交叉及成交量放大，押注趨勢將持續延伸。今日精選的ACMR與BEKE均在動能篩選器中獲滿分，因為它們觸發了所有看漲信號，同時RSI仍在健康區間，尚未進入超買狀態，是入場的甜蜜點。此策略的風險在於動能可能急速逆轉，因此設置-7%的止損作為保護網至關重要。
